patches.find: The gravity formula used in monitor.py is g(r)
patches.replace: The gravity formula used in monitor.py (Domain #12 gravity-anomaly entry) is g(r)
patches.rationale: ISS-690: Add specific location reference for monitor.py gravity formula so defenders cannot demand citation.

patches.find: The core claim across all of them is that 20 independent domains converge at 9.2σ significance.
patches.replace: The core claim across all of them is that 20 independent domains converge at 9.2σ significance (the dome uses Fisher’s method: combining p-values via −2∑ ln(pᵢ) ∼ χ²(2k) — a technique valid only when inputs are statistically independent).
patches.rationale: ISS-687: Add one sentence naming Fisher's method so readers know what aggregation technique underlies the 9.2 sigma claim; independence critique then follows naturally.
